name: bicycle

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <rect width="512" height="512" fill="#ffffff"/>
  <g fill="none" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="16" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
    <circle cx="150" cy="360" r="90"/>
    <circle cx="362" cy="360" r="90"/>
    <path d="M150 360 L220 250 L300 360 L238 360 L190 290"/>
    <path d="M220 250 L285 250 L320 210"/>
    <path d="M300 360 L362 360"/>
    <path d="M238 360 L362 360"/>
    <path d="M190 290 L170 250 L220 250"/>
    <path d="M320 210 L360 210 L345 245"/>
    <path d="M210 240 L235 240"/>
    <path d="M160 250 L185 250"/>
  </g>
</svg>
